title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 264.081 - Hearings on refusals or revocations, procedure
text:
264.081.  Hearings on refusals or revocations, procedure. — Any person who is refused any permit or certificate of health, or who has had any permit or certificate revoked, may request a hearing before the director of agriculture.  The request must be made in writing no later than thirty days after the date on which such person was notified of the denial or revocation of a permit or certificate of health.
(L. 1978 S.B. 683 § 8)
